title: Fix a missing await that corrupts async results
task: `npm test` fails: `processAll` in src/queue.js is supposed to return an array of resolved numbers but it pushes un-awaited Promises into the results array, so callers get pending Promises instead of values. Fix the actual async bug (await each result) while keeping the in-order, sequential behavior and the return shape (a plain array of resolved numbers). Do not modify the tests. Run the tests to verify.
notes: The bug is deterministic (no real timing race), but the fix must be a real await rather than e.g. resolving the promises in the test. file_not_contains removes the buggy push; the test pin blocks rewriting the assertion.
